# SenticMoney — Full Context for AI Agents

> This file provides the complete content summary of senticmoney.com in a single document, following the llms.txt specification. For the index version with links, see https://senticmoney.com/llms.txt

# SenticMoney

> SenticMoney is a privacy-first personal finance app that uses AI to help you budget your way — zero-based, envelope, 50/30/20, pay-yourself-first, or hybrid — and get financial insights, all without sending your data to the cloud. All financial data stays on your device. Free tier available forever; Standard tier is $39/year with AI chat, receipt scanning, bank imports, and cash flow planning. Built by E-Comm Solutions LLC in Wyoming, USA.

SenticMoney is designed for people who want powerful budgeting tools without sacrificing privacy. Unlike cloud-based apps (YNAB, Monarch Money, EveryDollar, Quicken Simplifi), SenticMoney stores everything locally in a SQLite database on your computer. There is no Plaid integration and no bank credential sharing. The SenticMoney Genie (powered by Gemini 3.1 Pro) sends only an aggregated financial summary for AI processing — never your full transaction history — and nothing is stored on external servers.

## How SenticMoney Works

SenticMoney is a desktop application that runs a local web server on your computer. You access it through your browser at localhost. Your financial data lives in a SQLite database file on your hard drive — it never touches cloud servers, third-party APIs, or shared databases. Bank statements are imported manually via CSV, Excel, OFX, QFX, or PDF files — there is no Plaid integration and no bank credential sharing required. The AI assistant (SenticMoney Genie) sends only a minimal aggregated summary to the AI provider for processing, never raw transaction data. The app supports Windows 10/11 natively and macOS via a signed and notarized DMG. Other devices on the same home network (iPhone, iPad, Android, Chromebook) can access SenticMoney through the browser using the computer's local IP address.

## Why SenticMoney

- **100% local data storage** — your finances never leave your device. No cloud accounts, no data mining, no ads.
- **No Plaid, no bank login sharing** — import bank statements manually via CSV, Excel, OFX, QFX, or PDF instead of handing over bank credentials to a third party.
- **Works offline** — Free tier is fully offline; Standard tier needs internet only for AI features.
- **AI-powered financial assistant** — the SenticMoney Genie understands your financial context in plain English, with page-aware responses, file attachments, voice input, and multilingual support.
- **Flexible budgeting methods** — supports zero-based, envelope, 50/30/20, pay-yourself-first, and the exclusive Runway cash flow method. Users are never locked into a single approach (unlike YNAB which is zero-based only, or GoodBudget which is envelope only).
- **Dramatically cheaper than alternatives** — $39/year vs YNAB ($109/yr), Monarch Money ($99.99/yr), EveryDollar (~$79.99/yr), Quicken Simplifi ($71.88/yr).
- **Multi-device access** — install on one computer, access from any device on your home network via browser (phone, tablet, second computer).
- **Split transactions** — divide a single purchase across multiple budget categories (e.g., a $150 Costco trip → $100 Groceries + $50 Household).

Platform: Windows 10/11 desktop application with native Mac support (v2.5.4+). Other devices (iPhone, iPad, Android, Chromebook) can access via browser on the same home network.

## How SenticMoney Compares

| Feature | SenticMoney | YNAB | Monarch Money | EveryDollar | Quicken Simplifi | GoodBudget |
|---------|-------------|------|---------------|-------------|-----------------|------------|
| Annual price | Free / $39 | $109 | $99.99 | ~$79.99 | $71.88 | Free / $80 |
| Data storage | Local (your device) | Cloud | Cloud | Cloud | Cloud | Cloud |
| Plaid/bank login required | No | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes | No |
| Budgeting methods | Any (zero-based, envelope, 50/30/20, pay-yourself-first, Runway, hybrid) | Zero-based only | Any (passive tracking) | Zero-based only | Any | Envelope only |
| AI assistant | SenticMoney Genie (Gemini 3.1 Pro) | No | Yes | No | No | No |
| Works offline | Yes (Free tier fully offline) | No | No | No | No | Partial |
| Receipt scanning | Yes (AI Vision) | Yes | Yes | No | Yes | No |
| Import formats | CSV, Excel, OFX, QFX, PDF | Bank sync (Plaid) | Bank sync (Plaid) | Bank sync (Plaid) | Bank sync (Plaid) | Manual only |
| Financial calculators | 4 (loan, credit card, savings, snowball vs avalanche) | No | No | No | No | No |
| Cash flow planning | Runway (payday-to-payday) | No | No | No | Watchlist | No |

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Does SenticMoney require an internet connection?**
The Free tier works fully offline with no internet needed. The Standard tier needs internet only for AI-powered features (Genie chat, receipt scanning, bank statement PDF parsing). All other Standard features work offline.

**Can I import transactions from my bank?**
Yes. SenticMoney supports CSV, Excel (.xlsx), OFX, QFX, and PDF bank statement imports with 15+ bank presets including Chase, Bank of America, Wells Fargo, Citi, Capital One, US Bank, PNC, TD Bank, Ally, Discover, Amex, Navy Federal, USAA, Schwab, and Fidelity. No Plaid or bank login required.

**What platforms does SenticMoney run on?**
SenticMoney runs natively on Windows 10/11 and macOS. Once installed on one computer, you can access it from any device on your home network (iPhone, iPad, Android phone, Chromebook, second computer) through a web browser.

**How much does SenticMoney cost?**
The Free tier is $0 forever with no time limits. The Standard tier is $39/year. Use promo code WELCOME20 to save 20% your first year ($31.20). There is a 30-day money-back guarantee.

**Is my financial data safe?**
All financial data is stored locally in a SQLite database on your computer. Nothing is uploaded to cloud servers. There is no account creation, no Plaid integration, and no bank credential sharing. The AI assistant sends only an aggregated summary for processing — never your raw transaction data.

**What budgeting methods does SenticMoney support?**
Zero-based budgeting, envelope budgeting, the 50/30/20 rule, pay-yourself-first, and the exclusive Runway cash flow method. You can also combine methods for a hybrid approach. Unlike YNAB (zero-based only) or GoodBudget (envelope only), SenticMoney does not lock you into a single method.

**What is the SenticMoney Genie?**
The Genie is an AI-powered financial assistant built into SenticMoney Standard. You can ask questions in plain English like "How much did I spend on groceries last month?" or "Am I on track for my savings goal?" It supports voice input, file attachments, and multilingual conversations. Powered by Gemini 3.1 Pro with 50 queries per day.

**Can I try SenticMoney before downloading?**
Yes. There is a free live demo at sentic-web-demo.onrender.com pre-loaded with sample data. You can also download the Free tier which has no time limit and no credit card required.

**What is Runway cash flow planning?**
Runway is SenticMoney's exclusive payday-to-payday cash flow method. It calculates your Living Money (income minus fixed expenses), gives you a daily budget ($/Day), and tracks actual vs planned spending across each pay period. It auto-populates from your income sources, bills, and budgets.

**How does SenticMoney compare to YNAB?**
SenticMoney is $39/year vs YNAB's $109/year. SenticMoney stores data locally (YNAB is cloud-only). SenticMoney supports multiple budgeting methods (YNAB is zero-based only). SenticMoney has an AI assistant (YNAB does not). SenticMoney does not require Plaid or bank login sharing (YNAB requires Plaid). Both support manual transaction entry and bank statement imports.

## Main Pages

- [Homepage](https://senticmoney.com/): Product overview with feature highlights, competitor comparison table, user testimonials, and download links for Windows and Mac
- [Features](https://senticmoney.com/features): Complete feature showcase — AI chat assistant, 5 budgeting methods, receipt scanning, bank statement imports (CSV/Excel/OFX/QFX/PDF), cash flow planning, financial health score, bill tracking, goals, financial calculators, multi-device access, and accounting dashboard with Sankey chart
- [Pricing](https://senticmoney.com/pricing): Free tier ($0 forever, unlimited transactions, full offline budgeting) and Standard tier ($39/year with AI chat, receipt scanning, bank imports, Runway cash flow, advanced reports). Full feature comparison and FAQ
- [Download](https://senticmoney.com/download): Download installers for Windows 10/11 (.exe) and macOS (.dmg), system requirements, and step-by-step installation guide
- [Live Demo](https://sentic-web-demo.onrender.com): Try SenticMoney in your browser without downloading — pre-loaded with 12 months of sample financial data
- [Support](https://senticmoney.com/support): FAQ covering installation, data storage, bank imports, multi-device setup, AI features, backup management, and 30-day refund policy
- [Site Map](https://senticmoney.com/map): Complete site navigation and feature directory
- [Videos](https://senticmoney.com/videos): Video tutorials and feature walkthroughs
- [Privacy Policy](https://senticmoney.com/privacy): How data is handled — all financial data stays on your device, no cloud storage, no third-party data sharing
- [Author](https://senticmoney.com/author/frank-d-campbell): About Frank D. Campbell, creator of SenticMoney

## Features — Free Tier ($0 Forever)

- Manual transaction entry with unlimited transactions
- Dashboard with spending charts (income vs expenses, spending by category, budget progress)
- Budget tracking with progress bars, carry forward, and overspend alerts
- Custom categories and subcategories with color-coded icons
- Financial Goals with target dates, priority levels, and progress tracking
- Bills and subscription tracking with due date alerts and payment detection
- Income source tracking (salary, freelance, rental, Social Security, etc.) with multiple pay schedules
- Financial Calendar (3-month rolling view, color-coded by event type)
- Financial Health Score (0-100 across savings rate, debt-to-income, emergency fund, expense ratio)
- Reminders with daily, weekly, monthly, and yearly recurrence
- Tags for cross-category tracking (tax-deductible, vacation, reimbursable, project-based)
- Balance reconciliation
- Backup management (primary + secondary backup location)
- Financial Calculators: loan/mortgage payoff, credit card payoff, compound interest/savings, debt snowball vs avalanche comparison
- Light and dark themes

## Features — Standard Tier ($39/year)

Everything in Free, plus:

- Smart bank statement imports: CSV, Excel, OFX, QFX, PDF with 15+ bank presets (Chase, Bank of America, Wells Fargo, Citi, Capital One, US Bank, PNC, TD Bank, Ally, Discover, Amex, Navy Federal, USAA, Schwab, Fidelity, and custom mapping)
- SenticMoney Genie (AI assistant): ask questions in plain English like "How much did I spend on groceries?" — page-aware context, file attachments (CSV, Excel, PDF, images), voice input, multilingual support, 50 queries/day
- Receipt scanning with AI Vision: photograph a paper receipt, upload an email (.eml), paste text (.txt), or upload a PDF — AI extracts itemized data
- Auto-categorization with keyword-based mapping rules
- Split transactions across multiple budget categories
- Runway Cash Flow Planning: Living Money metric, $/Day daily budget, payday-to-payday periods, auto-populate from income/bills/budgets, actual vs planned comparison, trend charts, credit card log
- Advanced financial reports: income statements, balance sheets, cash flow statements, tax summaries
- Accounting Dashboard with financial health indicators and Money Flow Sankey chart (visualizes how income sources flow into expense categories)
- Export to Excel and PDF
- Email support (1-2 business day response)
- Promo code WELCOME20 saves 20% first year ($31.20)
